node.text:
The taste of Chinese New Year, brought to life.
Crafted as golden sugar dragon and phoenix,
refined into the pure aroma of Moutai.
When craftsmanship meets Chinese New Year,
every wish for life returns gently, one sip at a time.

#SugarPainting #Moutai #ChineseNewYear #ChineseCrafts  #TheArtofAChineseToast

Spring arrives with rain on the land and lanterns alive with celebration.
Fish Lantern Parade delivers fortune to every gathering home.
Time distilled into every drop, warming every shared table.
Across mountains and seas, Moutai toasts with the world. 
Near or far, we gather to begin a new chapter of spring.

#FishLanternParade #Moutai #ChineseNewYear #RainWater #24SolarTerms #TheArtofAChineseToast

Write Spring Festival couplets and paste them by the door to bring blessings.
The red ribbon tied around the Moutai is like a hand-tied wish, passing on good fortune.
As the new year begins, mellow aromas unfold.
May luck endure, and peace accompany every year.

#Moutai #ChineseNewYear #SpringFestivalCouplets #TheArtofAChineseToast

node.text:
East to West. Homeland to horizons. 
Moutai crosses time zones and seas - pouring Chinese New Year wishes into glasses worldwide.
Your festive moments, our honored presence.
Wherever you roam, we toast to reunion. 🥃✨

#Moutai #ChineseNewYear #HappyNewYear

Chinese New Year’s Eve. 
Lights glow in every home, as the taste of the New Year moves from table to table. 
Within, the warmth of home. 
Beyond, the spirit of the New Year in full celebration. 
Moutai raises a glass with the world, welcoming the new year together. 

#NewYearsEve #Moutai #ChineseNewYear #FamilyReunionDinner

node.text:
Moutai’s global journey is moving from being seen to being truly understood.
To fashion designer Ben Fusari, it represents an uncompromising devotion to detail.
To Italian bartender Filippo Sanchi, it is a beautifully balanced creation.
When craftsmanship transcends language and geography, one glass becomes a shared resonance across the world.
As the Chinese New Year approaches, raise a glass of Moutai to all who dedicate themselves to the craft of living.

#Moutai #ChineseNewYear #SpringFestival #SharedMoments

A letter speaks, love echoes.
Romance needs no fanfare — just a note, a seal, a glass of fine liquor.
Roses perfume the gentle years; a ring seals a lifetime of devotion.
As the wax seal is solemnly pressed, the richness of 53% vol holds 100% sincerity.
This moment, a testament to love, becomes eternity.

#Moutai #ValentinesDay #ToastToLove

Every New Year moment has its own meaning.
And Moutai is there — in just the right way.

From lively family gatherings,
to quiet smiles between old friends,
from meaningful business moments,
to a calm glass enjoyed alone.

This Chinese New Year, we invite you to choose ONE New Year scene with Moutai from the image — A, B, C, or D.

📌 Comment with: Your choice (A / B / C / D) + the reason why
🎁 6 lucky participants will receive a $10 Amazon Gift Card!

Define your New Year moment and let this glass mark it.

#ChineseNewYear #NewYearMoment #SceneWithMoutai

Morning mist rises, and the land slowly warms. In China’s Chishui River Valley, craftsmen follow the guidance of season and experience, welcoming the first light of spring and the quiet awakening of Moutai’s aroma.

#Moutai #StartOfSpring #24SolarTerms

Laba Festival marks a warm beginning to the Chinese New Year.
In fleeting moments of time, mellow aroma lingers at the fingertips.
Moutai, with handcrafted devotion, awaits the promise of a new year.

#Moutai #LabaFestival

Retrace the glorious journey of 2025 with Moutai.
Time witnesses the honors, and the world rewards the endeavors.

#Moutai #2025Honors #SpiritOfTheAge #ToastingTheWorld

By candlelight, a fine spirit marks the moment.

As 2026 begins,
a toast of Moutai opens the first chapter of the new year.

#Moutai #HappyNewYear #AToastTo2026

✨ The #MoutaiColorUpChallenge has come to a beautiful close ✨
Thank you for coloring this festive season with creativity and inspiration. 🎨
Each artwork told a story, turning the moment into something truly memorable.
After careful review, 10 creators stood out.
🎉 Congratulations to the winners — and thank you to every participant who shared their creativity with us.

#Moutai #MoutaiColorUpChallenge #ChristmasVibe

At the Christmas window, it is not only the festive scenery that is framed, but the meaning of togetherness and sharing.

Moutai honors the golden passage of time, and every joyful gathering spent with family.

#Moutai #MerryChristmas #ChristmasWithMoutai #FestiveMoments #SeasonOfJoy

The ritual of Christmas Eve
lives in a flavor worth waiting for.

#Moutai #ChristmasEve #ChristmasWithMoutai

If Moutai had a holiday outfit, what color would it be? 🎄
Classic Christmas tones?
Sweet macaron shades?
Or your own limited-edition palette?

Join the #MoutaiColorUpChallenge and color the Moutai Christmas Tree your way! 🎨✨

How to join:
1️⃣ Download the Moutai Christmas Tree line art from the Google Drive link:
https://drive.google.com/file/d/1JFRkAxKq4YbgK5WBZznbQVI0zt4Qffe5/view?usp=sharing 
2️⃣ Color it using any creative method you like. 
(👉 https://mouaicolor-upchallenge.netlify.app is a recommended tool)
3️⃣ Post your artwork on your own profile, tag @moutai.china and add #MoutaiColorUpChallenge in your post

🎁 Prize Details (Please read carefully):
🏆We will select 10 creators from all valid entries
- Winners located in regions with authorized Moutai distributors will receive one 50ml bottle of Flying Fairy Moutai
- Winners in regions where alcohol delivery is unavailable or restricted will receive a $10 Amazon Gift Card
**Prizes will be fulfilled based on the winner’s location and applicable local laws and regulations. Thank you for your understanding.

📅 Deadline: December 29
📣 Winners Announcement: December 31 (via the official Moutai China account)

Add your colors to the holidays ✨
#Moutai #MoutaiColorUpChallenge #ChristmasVibe

Moutai reserves the right of final interpretation of this event within the scope permitted by law.

On the Winter Solstice, 
warmth deepens in every shared flavor, 
and time prepares a reunion meant to be savored.

#Moutai #WinterSolstice #24SolarTerms

node.text:
When a recreated century-old postcard is handed out once again, history meets the present in San Francisco.

Through a trilogy of experiences — a cultural exhibition, a commemorative gala, and a premium tasting — Moutai bridges the 110-year legacy of the Panama–Pacific honor with the 10-year milestone of San Francisco Moutai Day, creating a dialogue that transcends time.

Where the past resonates, the future takes flight. Moutai’s story continues to unfold on the global stage.

#Moutai #110YearsJourneytotheWorld #He110MOUTAI #MoutaiDay

node.text:
110 years on, Moutai continues to write its enduring legend.
From the Golden Award  at the Panama–Pacific International Exposition to our return to San Francisco, we look back to the “Age of Progress” in 1915 and the “Moment of Friendship” in 2015.
Across a century, this memory has become more than a bottle of baijiu, it has become a legacy of spirit and culture.
Brewing with the world. Journeying with time.

#Moutai #110YearsJourneytotheWorld #He110MOUTAI

From century-old memories to contemporary storytelling, Moutai’s journey across North America becomes a meeting point between history and the future.

Beneath the dome of the Palace of Fine Arts, guests witnessed not only where Moutai has been, but where Moutai and the world will go together.

#Moutai #MoutaiNight #110YearsJourneytotheWorld #He110MOUTAI

In San Francisco, Moutai walks out of history carrying 110 years of memory and Eastern elegance.

From a recreated 1915 exposition postcard, we trace the echoes of the "Jinshan ship" and the glory born along the Chishui River.

History awakens through a cultural exhibition where Moutai’s shared memories with America and the world become vivid and within reach.

#Moutai #110YearsJourneytotheWorld #He110MOUTAI

At the Palace of Fine Arts, the historic stage of 1915 once again lights up for “Moutai Night,” weaving a feast of cultures and a journey across time.

As Chen Hua, Chairman of Kweichow Moutai Co.,Ltd., said, “Here is where Moutai began its path to the world, becoming the top spirit brand.”

Tonight, we toast to 1915’s remarkable beginning and to the future we will shape hand in hand.

#Moutai #MoutaiNight #110YearsJourneytotheWorld #He110MOUTAI

As Major Snow brings the winter chill,
True craftsmanship kindles an inner warmth.
Wrapped softly in comfort's embrace,
Where courtesy and sentiment find perfect harmony.

#Moutai #MajorSnow #24SolarTerms

110 years ago, Moutai dazzled the world at the Panama–Pacific International Exposition.

10 years ago, “San Francisco Moutai Day” honored the bond between a city and Moutai.

As Moutai returns to where the global story began, a cultural exhibition and a commemorative gala dinner will be held at the Palace of Fine Arts in San Francisco from December 7 to 8 — honoring our shared memories and embracing the journey ahead. We look forward to reconnecting, celebrating, and creating new stories together.

#Moutai #110YearsJourneytotheWorld #He110MOUTAI

Gratitude to everyone brought together by Moutai.
Every journey becomes extraordinary because of you, and every note of aroma grows richer with your presence.

💬 Which encounter or moment are you most thankful for? Tell us your story below. 

#Moutai #ThanksgivingDay #CheersWorldwide

node.text:
A Moutai lover from Togo stepped into Moutai and shared his unforgettable story.
He said: “I’ve treasured this bottle of such great quality for many years. Being here today at Moutai makes me both happy and thrilled.”

#Moutai #AmazingGuizhouAmazingMoutai #MoutaiSuperFactory

Minor Snow ushers in the season’s first cold.
Toast to fire-side talks with a cup of Moutai, and let the warmth score your winter’s opening chapter.

#Moutai #MinorSnow #24SolarTerms

From the green to the gala, from every swing to every toast,
Every frame shines, every moment inspires. 🥂
Swipe through for more “Nice Shot” moments from the Moutai Singapore Open! 📸

#Moutai #MoutaiSingaporeOpen #MoutaiSGO #MoutaiNiceShot

node.text:
Neat or mixed, every sip tells a story.
At the Moutai Tasting Bar, discover your own Nice Shot:
“The first sip was strong, the second revealed its smooth, refined soul.”🥂

#Moutai #MoutaiSingaporeOpen #MoutaiSGO #MoutaiVIPLounge #MoutaiNiceShot

node.text:
At the Moutai VIP Lounge, players shared stories of passion, age, and discovery.

From the thrill of first impressions to the pride of experience, every sip of Moutai tells a story worth celebrating. ⛳🥂

@paul_caseygolf @marcusfrasergolf @asiantour @intseriesgolf 

#Moutai #MoutaiSingaporeOpen #MSO2025 #MoutaiNiceShot

Where culture met craftsmanship.
The Moutai booth turned heads with its zodiac-inspired bottles, premium editions and curated Moutai cocktails.

Thank you to our Title Sponsor, Kweichow Moutai, for elevating the Moutai Singapore Open experience ✨

#MoutaiSGO #InternationalSeries #ThisISEverything #TimeToRise

node.text:
Congratulations to Yosuke Asaji on claiming victory in Singapore! 🏅@yo0524
His story with Moutai began as a special coaching guest at the International Series Japan, and continued all the way to a clutch, playoff-winning shot at the Moutai Singapore Open.
A champion’s journey, written with every swing.

@asiantour @intseriesgolf 

#Moutai #MoutaiSingaporeOpen #MoutaiSGO #MSO2025 #MoutaiNiceShot

node.text:
A “Nice Shot” on the fairway celebrates triumph.
A “Nice Shot” at the “Moutai Night” honors timeless craftsmanship.
From the banks of the Chishui River to the lights of Singapore, Moutai raises a toast to the world.

#Moutai #MoutaiNight #MoutaiSingaporeOpen #MoutaiSGO #MoutaiNiceShot

Bound by mountains and seas, celebrated in Singapore.
At the Moutai Night, “Nice Shot” takes on a richer, more refined meaning.
A toast to friendship across borders and craftsmanship perfected through time. 🥂

#Moutai #MoutaiSingaporeOpen #MoutaiSGO #MSO2025 #MoutaiNiceShot

node.text:
Round 3 delivered another iconic moment!
Mexico’s Roberto Lebrija @bolebrija fired a stunning shot that skimmed past the hole, locking in a “near hole-in-one highlight” at the Moutai Singapore Open. ⛳

@asiantour @intseriesgolf
 
#Moutai #MoutaiSingaporeOpen #MoutaiSGO #MSO2025 #MoutaiNiceShot

node.text:
Moutai — a toast to the power of legacy.
Join pro golfers John Catlin @catlinjohn and Steve Lewton @stevelewton as they share their on-course secrets: stay parallel, relax your body, and focus on the moment.
What’s your “swing ritual”? 👇

@asiantour @intseriesgolf 

#Moutai #MoutaiSingaporeOpen #MoutaiSGO #MSO2025 #MoutaiNiceShot

🏆 Champion Announced
After a nail-biting playoff, Yosuke Asaji @yo0524 clinched the Moutai Singapore Open title with a total score of 269 (-19). 
"Nice Shot" wasn’t just a cheer — it was today’s theme. 
Nice Shot, Champion!

@asiantour @intseriesgolf 

#Moutai #MoutaiSingaporeOpen #MoutaiSGO #MSO2025 #MoutaiNiceShot

Scenes from a Sunday to remember at the Moutai Singapore Open 🇸🇬 🎥 ❤️

#MoutaiSGO #InternationalSeries #TimeToRise

node.text:
Yosuke Asaji returns to the winner’s circle on the Asian Tour🥇

He becomes the sixth Japanese and the first since 1976 to lift the prestigious trophy at the Moutai Singapore Open. ⛳🇸🇬

#MoutaiSGO #InternationalSeries #TimeToRise

Vietnamese Moutai lovers say, “The more important the moment, the more likely you’ll see Moutai.”
But after stepping into Moutai’s Super Factory, they saw something deeper—
that the true importance of Moutai lies in its craft, its patience,and the beauty it brings into everyday life.
Their “Moutai Revelation” is now quietly taking root in Vietnam.

#Moutai #AmazingGuizhouAmazingMoutai #MoutaiSuperFactory

node.text:
The 2025 Singapore 1st Moutai Cocktail Competition Champion, Amy Guan’s “Candy Shop Daydream”, has landed at the #MoutaiSingaporeOpen!
Sweet on the outside, full of surprises inside — see what the taste-testers say👇 @beccadefoe 
Tournament in full swing… would you pick this champion drink?🍸✨

#Moutai #MoutaiSGO #MSO2025 #MoutaiNiceShot

node.text:
🏌️‍♂️Another near miss with 165 bottles of Moutai!
In Round 2 of the Moutai Singapore Open, India’s S.S.P. Chawrasia @sspchawrasia came close to a hole-in-one.
Still smiling, he’s ready for an even more exciting next shot.

@asiantour @intseriesgolf 

#Moutai #MoutaiSingaporeOpen #MSO2025 #MoutaiNiceShot

node.text:
Swing with style on the course, savor the smoothness off it.
Day 2 at the Moutai Singapore Open hits different: it’s not just the shots that impress—it’s every sip at the Moutai booth. From that first taste to the lingering finish, you feel the Moutai magic. 🥂

@asiantourgolf @intseriesgolf

#Moutai #MoutaiSingaporeOpen #MSO2025 #MoutaiNiceShot

Off the course, the Moutai booth became the real crowd-puller.🔥
A whole wave of guests “smelled their way” over.
Turns out everyone was chasing that star of the show… check the pic to see why. 👀

#Moutai #MoutaiSingaporeOpen #MSO2025 #MoutaiNiceShot

From the aroma of the “Super Factory” to the harmony of cultures.
Italian guests crossed language barriers to rediscover Moutai. They found that Moutai’s “fourth ingredient” is time — the time of understanding and shared resonance between East and West.
Moutai, let the world feel the warmth of Eastern craftsmanship. ✨

#Moutai #AmazingGuizhouAmazingMoutai #MoutaiSuperFactory

node.text:
One step away from 165 bottles of Moutai! 💥
Chase Koepka @chasekoepka from the USA delivered an insane shot in Round 1, missing the hole-in-one by just a tiny bit!
This shot? Straight-up a Nice Shot moment.

@asiantour @intseriesgolf 

#Moutai #MoutaiSingaporeOpen #MSO2025 #MoutaiNiceShot

node.text:
Moutai Singapore Open Round 1 ignites—
Every swing writes its own highlight.
The spirit takes flight, right here, right now. ✨

@asiantour @intseriesgolf

#Moutai #MoutaiSingaporeOpen #MSO2025 #MoutaiNiceShot

Moutai Singapore Open fires up from Round 1. 🔥
Korean‘s Jeunghun Wang @jeunghun_wang comes in blazing with nine birdies and a 64, seizing the solo lead by one shot.
One loud “Nice Shot” ignited the Singapore Island Country Club and set the tone for a high-energy showdown.
Moutai stands with golf fans worldwide as this thrilling week begins.

@asiantour @intseriesgolf 

#Moutai #MoutaiSingaporeOpen #MSO2025 #MoutaiNiceShot

A look back at the best of Round 1 🙌🏻 📸

#MoutaiSGO #InternationalSeries #TimeToRise

node.text:
When professional mastery meets pure passion.
When a precise swing collides with a moment of excitement.
Here’s to every Nice Shot at the Pro-Am of the #MoutaiSingaporeOpen! ⛳✨

@asiantour @intseriesgolf 

#Moutai #MSO2025 #MoutaiNiceShot

Swing for that Nice Shot, and raise your glass to Moutai!
The Moutai Singapore Open officially tees off! ⛳
Join us in toasting #MoutaiNiceShot moment that defines elegance on the green.

@asiantour @intseriesgolf

#Moutai #MoutaiSingaporeOpen #MSO2025

Moutai made its third appearance at the World Chinese Entrepreneurs Convention.

From November 2nd to 4th, the 18th WCEC was held in Macao, where Moutai continued to deepen its presence with localized engagement. As the official welcome dinner drink, the signature cocktail made with 43% Moutai surprised guests with its refined aroma and modern twist.

On this global business exchange stage, Moutai once again showcases the infinite possibilities of a Chinese heritage brand.

#Moutai #WCEC2025 #Macao #WorldChineseEntrepreneursConvention

⌛ Just 1 day left! 
The stars are ready, and the greens are about to heat up.
Prepare for the thrill of elite competition as the Moutai Singapore Open tees off TOMORROW! Get ready for every Moutai nice shot moment! 💥

@asiantour @intseriesgolf 

#Moutai #MoutaiSingaporeOpen #MSO2025 #MoutaiNiceShot

⏳ 2 Days to Go！
For the third time, Moutai joins hands with the Asian Tour. The Moutai Singapore Open is about to tee off!
See you in Singapore on Nov 6 for a toast to excellence.

@asiantour @intseriesgolf 

#Moutai #MoutaiSingaporeOpen #MSO2025 #MoutaiNiceShot

node.text:
Event Recap | Just inches away from 192 bottles of Moutai! 
American golfer M.J. Maguire delivered a stunning shot on Hole 5 during Round 3 of the Link Hong Kong Open—just inches away from a hole-in-one! Golf’s true charm lies in that thrilling almost. #CheersWithMoutai to every brilliant moment on the green!

#Moutai #MoutaiGolf #AToastToTheWorld #LHKO2025

Sights and scenes from the Moutai Singapore Open ⛳ 🇸🇬 🏌️‍♂️🐒

#MoutaiSGO #InternationalSeries #TimeToRise

node.text:
⏳ 3 days to go!
The countdown begins to a historic moment — the Moutai Singapore Open, Moutai’s first-ever title-sponsored Asian Tour event.
Get ready to witness legends rise and the aroma of Moutai fill the tropics. 🌴⛳

@asiantour @intseriesgolf 

#Moutai #MoutaiSingaporeOpen #MSO2025 #MoutaiNiceShot

node.text:
Street Talk: What's the buzz about the #MoutaiSingaporeOpen?
Turns out this player is the most anticipated one!
Who are YOU rooting for? Drop your picks below 👇

@asiantour @intseriesgolf 

#Moutai #MoutaiSingaporeOpen #AsianTour #MoutaiNiceShot

Cheers to the champion! 🏆
Northern Irish star Tom McKibbin set a new Hong Kong Open record at -27, and Moutai celebrated his victory — one bottle of Moutai, one unforgettable toast.
The story continues… See you in Singapore! 🇸🇬✨

@tommckibbin 

#Moutai #MoutaiGolf #LHKO2025 #AsianTour

node.text:
So close to an ace! 💯 
David Puig's heart-stopping tee shot on the 192-yard par-3 5th hole stopped just 5cm from the cup... the nearest to a hole-in-one all week!
#CheersWithMoutai to every thrilling shot! 👏 

@davidpuigcorrius 

#Moutai #MoutaiGolf #LHKO2025 #AsianTour

On November 3, Moutai’s brand ad lit up Osaka’s Dotonbori. Moutai blends poetry and spirits to share the warmth of Chinese culture with the world. A timeless invitation echoes: “Shall we share a drink?”

#Moutai #Osaka #Dotonbori #TasteThePoetry

node.text:
The journey continues from the Link Hong Kong Open to the Moutai Singapore Open! 🌏

A new challenge awaits at The Singapore Island Country Club! Let’s make it another week to remember. 🇸🇬 🙌

#MoutaiSGO #InternationalSeries #TimeToRise

node.text:
Northern Irish golf star and former U.S. Open champion @graeme_mcdowell stopped by the Moutai VIP Lounge during the Link Hong Kong Open this week. 
He discovered the stories behind Moutai and enjoyed a cocktail blending Eastern spirit with Western style. 
A toast to where worlds meet.

#Moutai #MoutaiGolf #AToastToTheWorld #TimeToRise #LHKO2025

node.text:
🏌️‍♂️ At the second round of the Link Hong Kong Open, South African star and 2011 Masters champion Charl Schwartzel came this close to a hole-in-one on the 192-yard 5th hole! From excitement to frustration, from anticipation to surprise — that’s the beauty of golf. 
Moutai raises a toast to every almost perfect shot.
#Moutai #MoutaiGolf #AToastToTheWorld #TimeToRise #LHKO2025

node.text:
🏌️‍♂️ At the first round of the Link Hong Kong Open, Paul Casey delivered a stunning shot on the 192-yard 5th hole — landing it right next to the pin! #CheersWithMoutai to brilliant moments on the green!
#Moutai #MoutaiGolf #AToastToTheWorld #TimeToRise #LHKO2025

node.text:
During the Link Hong Kong Open, Moutai hosted a special golf clinic at the Hong Kong Golf Club. Led by Chinese professional golfer Yuan Yechun, Moutai guests honed their swings and shared in the elegance of the game.
A toast to every refined stroke to progress, precision, and the spirit of Moutai.
#Moutai #MoutaiGolf #AToastToTheWorld #TimeToRise #LHKO2025

Moutai with You at Every Highlight | A Record-Breaking 60!
Northern Irish golfer Tom McKibbin shot a bogey-free 60, setting a new record at the Hong Kong Golf Club and leading the first round of the Link Hong Kong Open. As the Official Luxury Chinese Baijiu of the event, Moutai raises a toast with fans from around the world to every swing of excellence.
#Moutai #MoutaiGolf #AToastToTheWorld #TimeToRise #LHKO2025

node.text:
From the racetrack to the fairway, a champion’s spirit endures. 
At the Link Hong Kong Open Pro-Am, racing star @zacpurton joined Moutai on the greens — raising a toast to passion, precision, and victory! 
#Moutai #MoutaiGolf #AToastToTheWorld #TimeToRise #LHKO2025

Moutai presents the Art of the Swing. 
At the Link Hong Kong Open Pro-Am, Moutai’s exquisite gift from the East celebrated every graceful stroke and sincere passion on the course. From Tokyo’s spring to Hong Kong’s autumn, Moutai continues its elegant journey of craftsmanship and timeless heritage.
#Moutai #MoutaiGolf #AToastToTheWorld #TimeToRise

node.text: Passing the spirit, one splash at a time 💧 #MoutaiWaterRelayChallenge #MoutaiChina #LHKO2025 #InternationalSeries #TimeToRise

🏌️The Link Hong Kong Open will tee off this week at the Hong Kong Golf Club! As the Official Luxury Chinese Baijiu of the Asian Tour, Moutai is thrilled to make its mark in Hong Kong.
Don’t miss the excitement as Moutai presents a special hole-in-one prize at the 192-yard hole 5 — the first player to ace the hole will take home 192 bottles of Moutai!
Moutai's hospitality tent is all set up, so swing by to watch some great golf and create even greater memories.⛳️✨
#Moutai #MoutaiGolf #AToasttoTheWorld #TimeToRise

node.text:
The Link Hong Kong Open will soon tee off in a city celebrated for its elegance and energy. As the epitome of Chinese elegance, Moutai stands as a symbol of refined taste, celebrating the spirit of the East.
#Moutai #MoutaiGolf #AToastToTheWorld #TimeToRise

🌟 Galaxy Macau × Kweichow Moutai | Prestige Golf Gala 🌟
As the city’s luxury landmark meets the legend of Moutai, an exclusive autumn gala unfolds. The two-day Prestige Golf Tournament and Gala Dinner united elites, top golfers, and celebrity guests for a celebration of taste and honor. From fairway to gala night, Moutai bridged taste and triumph in a golden autumn celebration.
#GalaxyMacau #Moutai #Golf #AndyTang #LawrenceNg #KayeeTam #CindyLee

The Double Ninth Festival is a time to accompany our parents, to climb high, to gaze upon the beauty of autumn.
At the heart of every family gathering, a sip of Moutai connects generations, carrying warmth, respect, and timeless tradition.

#Moutai #DoubleNinthFestival #TasteOfTradition

When the art of speed meets the craft of time, Hong Kong Ferrari Owner’s Club discovered the spirit of craftsmanship at Moutai. Amid aroma and precision, they discovered the enduring spirit of quality and heritage.

A journey of excellence, culture, and resonance.

#Moutai #AmazingGuizhouAmazingMoutai #MoutaiSuperFactory

node.text:
A celebration on the greens, at a course with a century of history. 
The 2025 Moutai Golf Challenge – Hong Kong Station marked another chapter of culture meeting sport.
Between aroma and fairway, Moutai continues the dialogue between China and the world.
#Moutai #MoutaiGolfChallenge

Swinging for excellence, crafting new legends. The 2025 Moutai Golf Challenge – Hong Kong Station concluded in style at the historic Hong Kong Golf Club.

With every swing and every sip, Moutai blends Eastern craftsmanship with the elegance of golf, uniting cultures and sharing the warmth of tradition across the greens.

#Moutai #MoutaiGolfChallenge

Wishes rise with sky lanterns, and moonlight dances in glasses. 
At this moment, share Moutai with dear friends, and let every toast echo your blessings.
#MoutaiMidAutumn #MoonlightWithMoutai

True beauty lies in the harmony of nature and human spirit. 
Raise a glass of Moutai to this timeless perfection.
May it endure, like the eternal moon.
#MoutaiMidAutumn #MoonlightWithMoutai

Full moon. Full glasses. Full hearts.
Moutai makes reunions brighter.
#MoutaiMoment #MoutaiMidAutumn #MoonlightWithMoutai

Beneath the London night sky, every sip of Moutai connected flavors and cultures from East to West.

At the 30th international Spirits Challenge (ISC) Awards Dinner, Moutai shared the legacy of Chinese Baijiu with a global audience, celebrating heritage while inspiring new possibilities.

#Moutai #ISC #CulturalHeritage

When African rhythm meets the aroma of Moutai, creativity travels across continents. South African rap icon Nadia Nakai stepped into the Chishui River valley, interpreting Maotai through a musician’s lens. Culture doesn’t just resonate, it evolves through collision. @nadianakai 
#Moutai #CulturalFusion

Three Argentine football legends set foot in China for the first time, exploring Moutai’s “Super Factory” to unlock its legendary flavors. From red ribbons to green fields, China and Argentina’s cultures intertwine and flourish.

With its aroma as the messenger, Moutai carries these stories to the world.

#ToastWithMoutai #AmazingGuizhouAmazingMoutai #MoutaiSuperFactory #JorgeLuisBurruchaga #OscarAlfredoRuggeri #RicardoOmarGiusti

#MoutaiGolfChallenge debuts in Singapore—blending golf, culture & shared success! 

Hosted at Sentosa Golf Club’s Serapong Course, the event welcomed 120+ VIP guests for a day of flair. Asian Tour champions Nicholas Fung & Angelo Que led a golf clinic, followed by an 18-hole round with on-course games, prizes, and Moutai Golden Prince cocktails.

Awards and lucky draws include rare Moutai editions and Asian Tour Moutai Singapore Open VIP passes! More than golf—this was a hub for connections, lifestyle of refinement, respect, and shared growth.

Next stop: Hong Kong. Moutai’s merging fairway excellence with cultural spirit? Bottom up for Exceptional Craftsmanship!

The sea remains eternal, yet each drop has journeyed through the earth. Moutai never leaves Chishui River, yet its aroma reaches the widest world. Like the simmering heat of summer, quietly brewing its own zenith.
#MinorHeat #MoutaiMoment

Across oceans and through generations, the aroma of Moutai carries stories only time can distill. This Father's Day, we toast to the silent gifts of love that grow richer with every passing year.
#Moutai #FathersDay #ToastWithMoutai

A delicate fusion of flavors, a profound blend of cultures. During the Expo 2025 Osaka, Moutai unveils an exquisite tasting experience - where the artistry of Japanese cuisine dances with the timeless elegance of Moutai’s signature aroma.
#Expo2025Osaka #CulturalExchange #ToastWithMoutai #110YearswithEXPO

They came for the Expo, they stayed for the story behind the bottle. From every corner of the world, guests gathered shoulder to shoulder — captivated by the rich heritage of Moutai and the timeless allure of Chinese liquor culture.
At the heart of Osaka, Moutai brought together curious minds and open hearts — proving that culture, like good spirits, is meant to be shared.
#Expo2025Osaka #CulturalExchange #ToastWithMoutai #110YearswithEXPO

MOUTAI NIGHT lit up Osaka with the refined unveiling of five new masterpieces in the Kweichow Moutai Discovery Collection. Amid a celebration rich in Chinese cultural performances, the night became a stage for Eastern heritage and Western elegance to resonate. 
A toast across cultures, a moment beyond time — witnessed by mountains, embraced by seas.
#Expo2025Osaka #CulturalExchange #ToastWithMoutai #110YearswithEXPO #MOUTAINIGHT

Moutai debuts its MOUTAI DAY at Expo 2025 Osaka's China Pavilion. From a 1915 manuscript to today’s global spotlight, we trace a 110-year legacy through aroma, history, and innovation.
A toast to the next hundred years of harmony.
#Expo2025Osaka #CulturalExchange #ToastWithMoutai #110YearswithEXPO

Moutai Osaka World Expo 2025 Commemorative Baijiu shines as a symbol of cultural exchange and enduring friendship. Infused with the form and spirit of the China Pavilion, and wrapped in the iconic richness of Moutai, it glows at the summit of Osaka—bridging centuries, nations, and hearts.
#Expo2025Osaka #CulturalExchange #ToastWithMoutai #110YearswithEXPO

With the Expo 2025 Osaka now in full swing, Moutai proudly stands as the Strategic Partner of the China Pavilion, engaging the world in a dialogue of civilization through Eastern craftsmanship. 
Carrying millennia of heritage, this time-honored essence is now shared globally to compose a new chapter of prosperity.
#Expo2025Osaka #CulturalExchange #ToastWithMoutai #110YearswithEXPO

node.text:
Jinichiro Kozuma came the closest to claiming the 195 bottles of Flying Fairy Kweichow Moutai being offered by the tournament hosts for a hole-in-one on the 17th hole, when the Japanese player’s tee shot on the 195-yard par-three landed just short of the cup during the final round in Chiba.
#MoutaiNews #SwingtoSuccess #AsianTour

Lucas Herbert eagled the final hole to complete a dominant five-stroke victory in the #InternationalSeriesJapan presented by Moutai at the par-71 Caledonian Golf Club in Chiba, Japan on Sunday.
The Australian led at the end of all four rounds of the US$2 million tournament being hosted by the luxury Chinese Baijiu brand Moutai for the first time and his final day 64 put the finishing touches on a 20-under-par 264 total.
Herbert began the round tied for the lead with South Korea’s Song Young-han and Japan’s Yuta Sugihara, but his playing partners fell away on the back nine to finish in a share for second spot on -15 for the tournament.
#MoutaiNews #AsianTour
